r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Diabetic diets mean giving up good food
relatability_triggers: RECIPES FOR DIABETICS is a complete, all-purpose cookbook that means an end to monotonous meals for diabetics and their families.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: : The American Diabetics Association's updated Exchange Lists. Daily menu guides, tips on recipes for microwaving, tips on dining out. Exchange group breakdowns, measured individual serving calorie counts. Guides for using nutrition labeling to compute exchanges. Diabetic exchanges for brand-name products.
mechanism_proof_points: American Diabetics Association's updated Exchange Lists
Revised edition (proven by first edition popularity)
unique_differentiators: Comprehensive Exchange Lists application to 335+ recipes

lead.hook_sentence: RECIPES FOR DIABETICS is a complete, all-purpose cookbook that means an end to monotonous meals for diabetics and their families.
lead.full_text: RECIPES FOR DIABETICS is a complete, all-purpose cookbook that means an end to monotonous meals for diabetics and their families. This new, revised edition features even more of the practical, elegant and mouth-watering dishes that made the first edition so popular. RECIPES FOR DIABETICS can meet all your cooking and dining needs from easy family favorites like Chile Con Carne to gourmet treats like Cheese and Crab Oriental Style or Chocolate Chiffon Cake with Rum. You will also find delicious appetizers, soups, salads, breads, cookies, cakes, and drinks for every occasion-over 335 different recipes in all.

curiosity_progression.initial_gap: What kinds of recipes are included?
curiosity_progression.partial_resolution: 335 recipes from Chile Con Carne to Chocolate Chiffon Cake

metadata.source_file: Recipes-For-Diabetics 1981-2001 (4 Stars) Breakthrough Ad and Product.md
metadata.extraction_notes: Classic 20-year running book ad. Simple direct response format. Information product (cookbook). Targets diabetics AND general health-conscious readers. Pre-internet era mail order. Impressive longevity demonstrates evergreen appeal.

fssit_candidates.text: An end to monotonous meals for diabetics and their families
fssit_candidates.emotional_core: Finally recognized the meal monotony problem

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Single FSSIT in opening deck - acknowledges frustration but doesn't amplify

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: Pre-internet mail order era, print advertising
evergreen_elements: Desire for variety in restricted diets

extraction_quality.notes: Classic 20-year running book ad demonstrates evergreen appeal. Simple, direct format typical of 1980s-1990s information product advertising. Low sophistication stage but highly effective for its market. Broadened appeal section ('Not Just For Diabetics') smart market expansion. No testimonials or clinical proof - relies on ADA authority and content preview. The 20-year run proves formula worked despite simplicity.
